title: Create: Easier Goo
description: A simple mod/datapack that adds a new recipe for making slime balls.
body:
## About

Too lazy to farm cactus or find a slimechunk for slimeballs? Me too. This tiny mod adds a Create-compatible recipe so you can craft slimeballs right in your factory. No farms needed.

## Recipe

![A recipe of Slimeball made by using the mixer, a redstone, water and milk.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/168f57eafaa16b40c526c294e33f601d8a8144f9.webp)

You only need 250 ml of water, 250 ml of milk, and 1 redstone. 

## Tutorial + No forge version

I'm was too lazy to make a forge version, but I made a datapack so you don't need to install another mod. Here's a little tutorial.

1. First open Minecraft, and click on Singleplayer. If you've a server, just find the World folder, can't explain here sorry.
2. Click on the world you want the recipe and then click on "Edit" on the bottom of your screen.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65b896bb1ff43d432f89b64e8513412395dcda47_0.webp)
3. Then click on "Open World Folder".
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d20be4aea1ffe923f3099cb10f58e047d2049f9_0.webp)
4. After that, a bunch of folders will appear and you only need to find the "datapacks" one, if you can't find it, maybe try do create yourself, be careful because it need to be written exactly right, all lowercase.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4e8e6d1782af24a4d3d6f2c01b0c87013496412.png)
5. To finish, all you need to do is download the datapack and place it inside the datapacks folder, start Minecraft in the right version with Create and it should work. 

## Bugs

If somehow the recipe isn't right, you can send me a message in Twitter: @DayzWilliam.
